title: rubellia aurea
intro: Rubellia aurea, also known as golden ragwort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Rubellia aurea can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
